hero.name: Dinislam Yanursaev
hero.title: Senior QA Automation Engineer
hero.subtitle: Building robust test automation for Flutter apps. 2000+ tests from scratch.

testAutomation.title: Test Automation
testAutomation.description: Building comprehensive test suites from scratch — Widget, Golden, E2E. Patrol, Mocktail, CI/CD integration with Allure reporting.

flutterDev.title: Flutter Development
flutterDev.description: Cross-platform apps with Clean Architecture, BLoC pattern, and pixel-perfect UI. From concept to production on iOS, Android & Web.

qaLeadership.title: QA Leadership
qaLeadership.description: Leading QA teams, building test strategies, cutting regression cycles. From 3-day regression to 18 hours. App rating from 3.8 to 4.5.

about.description: From QA Manual to Senior SDET — I build robust test automation frameworks for Flutter applications. Passionate about quality, clean architecture, and shipping reliable software.

tochka.description: Sole QA automation engineer. Built entire test infrastructure from scratch: 2000+ automated tests (Widget + Golden + E2E), Patrol, Mocktail. CI/CD with GitLab CI and Allure. Device farm via Firebase Test Lab.

tooba.description: Led the QA team. 150+ automated tests from scratch: API (Python, pytest) + Mobile (Flutter). Regression cut from 3 days to 18 hours. Performance: FPS from 30 to 50+, app rating from 3.8 to 4.5.

kalimat.description: Functional, regression, smoke and acceptance testing of a web product. API testing (Python, Postman). Test case and test plan development.

phraseGym.title: EnglishFit
phraseGym.description: English Grammar Trainer with 150+ lessons. Built with Clean Architecture and BLoC pattern. Comprehensive test coverage with 67 tests.

flingArrows.title: Fling Arrows
flingArrows.description: Logic puzzle game with 50 levels featuring procedural generation. Custom rendering with CustomPainter and robust state management.

vpn.title: VPN Infrastructure
vpn.description: Self-hosted VPN solution with DPI resistance and transparent proxying. Built for privacy and unrestricted internet access.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Framer Motion & Tailwind CSS
